name: Majority Element-I
category: Solve Problems on Arrays [Easy -> Medium -> Hard]
statement:
Given an integer array nums of size n, return the majority element of the array.


The majority element of an array is an element that appears more than n/2 times in the array. The array is guaranteed to have a majority element.
constraints:
• n == nums.length.
  • 1 <= n <= 105
  • -104 <= nums[i] <= 104
  • One value appears more than n/2 times.

examples.explanation: The number 7 appears 5 times in the 9 sized array
The number 1 appears 4 times in the 6 sized array
